summary.binding_lens: person-centric, no-feature-loss (PERSON-CENTRIC-LENS.md). Every item carries a dual surface (person_surface + management_surface) over one contract + one data model; simplification re-sequences and re-centers, never drops a business/compliance capability.
summary.generator_first_doctrine: For EVERY buildable item the contract/asyncapi/SDK/codegen-template/codegen-emitter lands BEFORE the service/app, and every edge case folds back into tools/codegen, @curaos/*-sdk, or @curaos/contracts (curaos-generator-evolution-rule). In-flight generator/SDK barrier: do not dispatch downstream service workers while a codegen/SDK/contracts lane is agent-claimed or PR-open.
summary.license_gating: Permissive (Apache/MIT/BSD: health-data-standards, pophealth, activepieces, RAPTOR, ehmp-app, asrcm, avs, maternity-tracker, preproc-checklist, aware, vista-fhir-codex, fhir-on-vista, vista-m, vista-dashboard-rules) => category-2 copy/vendor or category-3 run-intact eligible. GPL/LGPL/MPL (openemr, odoo, erpnext, dolibarr, openhospital, openmrs-core, openmrs-fhir2/rest) => port-adapt clean-room model port or service-boundary, NEVER copied into a permissive/proprietary build. AGPL (espocrm, suitecrm, suitecrm-core, openmrs-distro, windmill, bahmni) + unknown (vista-vehu, FamilyHistoryCPRS, daily-plan) + source-available (n8n) => reference-only or service-boundary; data-model facts may inform a clean-room port but no code copy.
summary.scale: 66 explicit gaps + 81 absent/weak mappings + 60 high-value port-adapt mappings + 3 run-as-background-service + 4 api-adapter candidates across 11 domains, organized into 12 categories. P0 = revenue-cycle EDI (x12-sdk), clinical data plane (vitals/problems/meds/labs), connector registry, lead+cases, contract+subscription core. New net-new domain: insurance-broker (policy-core + insurance-sdk).
summary.scaffold_only_services_to_promote: healthstack-{claims,quality,interop,devices,problems,meds,lab,imaging,careplans}-service, business-{cases,projects}-service, fhir-client package - all chart+README only, promoted generator-first from new .tsp contracts.
summary.source_traceability: Every item cites source_files (external-sources/...) and target_local_files (curaos/...) from source-to-local-map.json, gap-analysis.json, code-reuse-ledger.json, license-risk-register.json.
summary.priority_legend: P0 blocks revenue/clinical-safety/data-plane truth; P1 named-module gaps + highest-reuse; P2 depth/parity; P3 enhancement/forward-filed.
summary.estimate_legend: S<=2d, M~1wk, L~2-3wk, XL>3wk or multi-service.
summary.cross_cutting_blocker: x12-sdk, fhir-client, connector-sdk, tax-engine, contract-sdk and the codegen screen-archetype + dual-surface emitter changes are upstream blockers; their dependent services must wait per the in-flight generator/SDK barrier.
